text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
You've been staring at me for a while<n>now. There
something you need from the<n>great Sweepy?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Um, well, I was wondering if you'd let<n>me borrow
your magical girl clothes and<n>stuff. ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I want to be a cute magical girl. That'dbe so grammable!

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
It'd be nice to have another magical girl<n>around,
but why now of all times?<n>Couldn't you have said
something<n>earlier?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Well, I would have asked sooner... but I<n>just
couldn't work up the courage...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you're the one and only<n>Sweepy... I've
admired your magicalness<n>for so long!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yep! Oh, you don't... mind, do you?<n>Sniffy-sniff...

text_block_list.name: Sweep Tosho
text_block_list.text:
W-well, I guess it's fine! Look, I'll lend<n>you some
clothes already, okay?
